title: MOWAERS Modular Wearable Health Monitoring System
description: Utility patent documentation for the MOWAERS (Modular Organ-Wise Analysis, Evaluation, Response and Safety System) wearable health monitoring platform. The invention focuses on a modular wearable architecture integrating detachable sensing modules, embedded electronics, personalized health analysis, and intelligent emergency response workflows. The patent documentation is currently under preparation and will continue to evolve alongside product development.

title: Highlighter Multi-Purpose Bluetooth Speaker
description: Utility patent documentation for the Highlighter Bluetooth Speaker focusing on an innovative multi-purpose product architecture combining consumer electronics with practical everyday utility. Documentation is actively being refined together with prototype development and engineering validation.

title: MOWAERS Wearable Band Industrial Design
description: Design patent documentation covering the external industrial design, modular enclosure, detachable wearable mechanism, and overall visual appearance of the MOWAERS wearable system. The design continues to evolve as newer prototype revisions are completed.
